scales.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0F2C59] leading-[1.1]
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0F2C59] leading-tight

spacing_and_layout.global_padding: py-20 md:py-28 px-6 md:px-12 max-w-7xl mx-auto

surfaces_and_borders.card: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:border-blue-100 transition-all duration-300

components_instructions.name: TopEmergencyBanner
components_instructions.notes: Thin banner at the very top (above navbar). bg-[#EF4444] or bg-[#0F2C59]. Text: 'Emergency? Call 24/7: +91 98765 43210'. White text, text-sm, centered. Must include a data-testid='emergency-banner'.

components_instructions.name: StickyNavbar
components_instructions.notes: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50 glass_header. Logo left. Desktop nav links center (text-[#0F2C59] hover:text-[#2563EB]). Right side: 'Call Now' button (visible on mobile too) + 'Book Appointment' button (desktop). Use Shadcn Sheet for mobile menu. data-testid='main-navbar'.

components_instructions.name: HeroSection
components_instructions.notes: Bento layout (12 cols). Left (col-span-1 to 7): overline '15 YEARS OF EXCELLENCE', H1 'Your Health, Our Priority', subtext intro to Dr. Rajesh Sharma. Buttons: 'Book Appointment' (primary blue) and 'Our Services' (secondary soft blue). Right (col-span-8 to 12): image of doctor in image_wrapper with soft subtle abstract background element.

components_instructions.name: AboutSection
components_instructions.notes: Grid 2 cols. Left: Modern clinic image. Right: H2 'About Dr. Rajesh Sharma', qualifications (MBBS, MD Cardiology), 15 years experience, patient philosophy text. Add small checkmark list for 'Achievements'.

components_instructions.name: ServicesCards
components_instructions.notes: Grid 1 md:grid-cols-3. Cards for 'Cardiac Consultation', 'ECG & Echo', 'Angioplasty'. Use Lucide icons (HeartPulse, Activity, Stethoscope) in a soft blue circular wrapper (bg-[#E6F4F1] text-[#2563EB]). Cards must use the 'card' surface style.

components_instructions.name: Testimonials
components_instructions.notes: bg-[#FAFCFF] full width. Title 'Patient Stories'. Masonry or flex row of 3 testimonial cards. Include 5 yellow stars (lucide Star fill) and patient name.

components_instructions.name: AppointmentBooking
components_instructions.notes: Use Shadcn forms (Input, Select, Textarea). Fields: Name, Phone, Email, Preferred Date (use Shadcn Calendar/DatePicker if possible, or native date input with custom styling), Time slot, Message. Submit button 'Confirm Booking'. Below form, add a large full-width button 'Book instantly via WhatsApp' (bg-[#25D366] text-white).

components_instructions.name: FloatingWhatsApp
components_instructions.notes: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50. bg-[#25D366] rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform. data-testid='floating-whatsapp'.

components_instructions.name: FooterContact
components_instructions.notes: bg-[#0F2C59] text-white. 2 or 3 cols. Col 1: Brand/Logo, Address in Mumbai, Phone, Email. Col 2: Working Hours. Col 3: Google Maps iframe embed (w-full h-48 rounded-xl). text-white/80 for body.

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-[#2563EB] text-white font-semibold hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] transition-all shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-[#E6F4F1] text-[#0F2C59] font-semibold hover:bg-[#D1EAE5] transition-all
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 rounded-full border-2 border-[#E6F4F1] text-[#0F2C59] font-semibold hover:bg-[#E6F4F1] transition-all

motion_and_interaction.hover: Scale up images slightly inside overflow-hidden wrappers on hover. Lift cards by -2px and increase shadow.
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for lists and grids (can be handled via simple CSS animations or framer-motion if used).

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all CTA buttons, form inputs, form submit buttons, nav links, floating buttons.
